2605.30231.title: Beyond 3D VQAs: Injecting 3D Spatial Priors into Vision-Language Models for Enhanced Geometric Reasoning
2605.30231.paper_summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) often struggle with robust 3D spatial reasoning. Prevailing methods that rely on fine-tuning with 3D visual question-answering (VQA) datasets may overfit dataset-specific biases, while integrating specialized 3D visual encoders is often inflexible and cumbersome. In this paper, we argue that genuine spatial understanding should emerge from learning fundamental geometric priors, not only from high-level VQA supervision. We propose GASP (Geometric-Aware Spatial Priors), a framework that injects these priors directly into the LLM's transformer layers. GASP employs a small correspondence head, applied as a deep supervision signal across all layers, and is trained with a dual objective leveraging ground-truth geometry from large-scale video scenes: a contrastive loss on ground-truth point correspondences enforces 2D view-invariance, while a depth consistency supervision resolves 3D geometric ambiguities. Our analysis first provides a diagnostic showing that standard VLMs' internal correspondence matching accuracy is very low (often below 5%). We then demonstrate that our training substantially improves this behavior, boosting peak layer-wise correspondence to over 70% and maintaining over 85% temporal robustness while baselines remain below 5%. These internal improvements translate to significant gains on downstream spatial benchmarks including +18.2% on All-Angles Bench and +29.0% on VSI-Bench, all without training on any 3D VQA data. Our findings indicate that learning from fundamental geometric priors is a promising and generalizable pathway towards VLMs with more reliable 3D spatial reasoning.
2605.30231.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型（VLMs）在穩健的三維空間推理方面經常遇到困難。依賴於使用三維視覺問答（VQA）數據集進行微調的現行方法可能會過度擬合數據集特定的偏見，而整合專門的三維視覺編碼器通常又不夠靈活且繁瑣。在本文中，我們主張真正的空間理解應該來自於學習基本的幾何先驗，而不僅僅是來自高層次的 VQA 監督。我們提出 GASP（幾何感知空間先驗），這是一個將這些先驗直接注入 LLM 的Transformer層的框架。GASP 使用一個小的對應頭，作為一個深度監督信號應用於所有層，並且以雙重目標進行訓練，利用來自大規模視頻場景的真實幾何：對真實點對應的對比損失強制執行 2D 視圖不變性，而深度一致性監督則解決了 3D 幾何模糊。我們的分析首先提供了一個診斷，顯示標準 VLM 的內部對應匹配準確率非常低（通常低於 5%）。然後我們展示了我們的訓練顯著改善了這一行為，將峰值層級的對應提升至超過 70%，並在基線保持低於 5% 的情況下維持超過 85% 的時間穩健性。這些內部改進轉化為下游空間基準的顯著增益，包括 All-Angles Bench 上的 +18.2% 和 VSI-Bench 上的 +29.0%，而且完全不需要在任何 3D VQA 數據上進行訓練。我們的研究結果表明，從基本幾何先驗中學習是一條有前途且可推廣的途徑，朝著擁有更可靠的 3D 空間推理的 VLMs 發展。
2605.30231.author: Chun-Hsiao Yeh et.al.
2605.30231.authors: Chun-Hsiao Yeh, Shengyi Qian, Manchen Wang, Yi Ma, Joseph Tighe, Fanyi Xiao
